summary: Iteration 104: Notification System Testing - Backend: 11/11 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All features working. Fixed route conflict between push_notifications.py and notification_routes.py by changing admin push notifications prefix to /admin-notifications. Fixed infinite loop bug in NotificationContext.js (fetchNotifications had circular dependency on notifications state). All notification features verified working.

minor.issue: Route conflict with push_notifications.py which also used /notifications prefix. Both /poll and /mark-all-read were routed to admin endpoints requiring admin access instead of user notification endpoints.
minor.fix: Changed push_notifications.py router prefix from '/notifications' to '/admin-notifications'

ui_bugs.issue: Infinite loop bug - 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error caused by fetchNotifications useCallback having [notifications] in dependency array while also calling setNotifications
ui_bugs.fix: Removed notifications from dependency array, added notificationsRef to track current notifications without causing re-renders

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell.js: data-testid='notification-bell-btn' and data-testid='notification-badge' properly implemented
NotificationCenter.js: data-testid='notification-panel' present, dropdown closes on outside click
NotificationContext.js: Fixed infinite loop, polling every 30 seconds, localStorage caching implemented
notification_routes.py: All CRUD endpoints working (GET /notifications, POST /mark-all-read, DELETE /notifications, etc.)
notification_service.py: Proper notification creation with types (generation_complete, download_ready, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Test notification created via MongoDB for demo user to verify badge functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system fully tested and working. Fixed infinite loop in NotificationContext.js by removing circular dependency. Fixed route conflict by renaming admin push notifications prefix. All 7 features from the requirements are working: bell icon in header, badge with unread count, clicking opens panel, API returns correct data, service creates notifications, mark as read updates count, clear all works.

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug: Route conflict - /api/notifications/poll and /api/notifications/mark-all-read returning 403 Admin access required
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.root_cause: push_notifications.py (admin module) was using same '/notifications' prefix as notification_routes.py (user module)

bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.bug: Maximum update depth exceeded - Infinite loop in NotificationContext
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.root_cause: fetchNotifications useCallback had [notifications] in dependency array, which changed whenever setNotifications was called, causing infinite re-renders
bugs_fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Removed notifications from dependency array, added notificationsRef to track current notifications for toast comparison without triggering re-renders
